intent_precise: MagMAX Plant DNA Isolation Kit [1/2]: Using res_lysis (reservoir, slot 4), res_precip (reservoir, slot 1). (1) Transfer 196µL from source to destination. (2) Pause: Please remove plate for 10min incubation @ 65C. When ready     return plate(s) to deck and click RESUME (3) Transfer 130µL from source (multiple wells) to destination (multiple wells). (4) Pause: Please remove plate(s), invert 2-3 times, and incubate on     ice for 5 minutes. When ready to continue, place plates back on deck and     click RESUME (5) Transfer 200µL from source to destination.
intent: For the first half of the MagMAX Plant DNA Isolation Kit protocol, start by transferring 196µL from the lysis reservoir in slot 4 to your samples, then remove the plate for a 10-minute incubation at 65°C. Once that's complete, add 130µL from the precipitation reservoir in slot 1 to each well, then take the plate out again to invert it 2-3 times and incubate on ice for 5 minutes. Finally, transfer 200µL from your source wells to the destination wells to complete this portion of the extraction.

commands.message: Please remove plate for 10min incubation @ 65C. When ready     return plate(s) to deck and click RESUME
Adding 130uL of precipitation to solution to wells...
Please remove plate(s), invert 2-3 times, and incubate on     ice for 5 minutes. When ready to continue, place plates back on deck and     click RESUME
Transferring 400uL of supernatant to deep well plates
Protocol complete. Store samples or move to DNA     purification
